title: Add sanitizeInput middleware function
description: Create `sanitizeInput(input: string): string` in `src/middleware/sanitize.ts` that strips HTML tags, trims whitespace, and normalizes unicode. With comprehensive tests.
existing_patterns: src/middleware/validation.ts - middleware utility pattern with NextRequest/NextResponse types
src/security/sanitizers.ts - existing sanitization functions (sanitizeHtml, sanitizeSql, sanitizeUrl, sanitizeFilePath) with comprehensive test coverage
src/utils/schema.ts - type-safe schema builder used in tests
vitest test co-location pattern - `.test.ts` files adjacent to source files in same directory
